creator: tobik@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Nathan from comment #1)
Cannot confirm.  It still does not build with SSL_DEFAULT=openssl111.

Also fails on 13.0-CURRENT:
http://beefy11.nyi.freebsd.org/data/head-i386-default/p485718_s340864/logs/errors/mongodb32-tools-3.2.11.log

Port is marked deprecated anyway, so there is really nothing to do here anymore.
